    ;
    d.prototype.sortArray = function(g) {
        var f = this;
        if (g) {
            return g.sort(function(i, h) {
                if (f.sortOrder == "desc") {
                    if (typeof i[f.sortFieldName] == "string") {
                        return h[f.sortFieldName].localeCompare(i[f.sortFieldName])
                    } else {
                        if (i[f.sortFieldName] < h[f.sortFieldName]) {
                            return 1
                        }
                        if (i[f.sortFieldName] > h[f.sortFieldName]) {
                            return -1
                        }
                        return 0
                    }
                } else {
                    if (typeof h[f.sortFieldName] == "string") {
                        return i[f.sortFieldName].localeCompare(h[f.sortFieldName])
                    } else {
                        if (i[f.sortFieldName] < h[f.sortFieldName]) {
                            return -1

            })
        }
    }

        if (o.sortFieldName) {
            t = o.sortArray(t)
        }
        for (n = t.length - 1; n >= 0; n--) {
            if (t[n].children) {
                q.unshift(t[n]);
                t.splice(n, 1)
            }
        }

        }
        var g = [], m, r, p, l, h = o.config, f = o.optionsConfig || {}, s;
        for (n = 0; n < q.length; n++) {
            r = q[n];
            g.push(r);
            for (m = 0; m < r.children.length; m++) {
                p = r.children[m];

                for (l = 0; l < t.length; l++) {
                    if (p == t[l][f.valueField || h.valueField || "value"]) {
                        g.push(t[l]);
                        t.splice(l, 1);
                        s = true;
                        break
                    }
                }
                if (!s) {
                    console.error("Advanced list child options not found for value: " + p)
                }
            }
        }
        if (t.length) {

        }

    ;
    d.prototype.prepareOptions = function() {
        var l = this
          , j = l.bf
          , n = []
          , p = l.options
          , g = l.config;

        }
        var m = l.localOptions
          , k = Array.isArray;

            p = l.sortArray(p)
        }
        var f = l.optionsConfig || {};
        for (var h = 0; h < p.length; h++) {
            var o = p[h];
            if (o.children) {
                m.push([o[f.valueField || g.valueField || "value"], o[f.textField || g.valueField || "text"], "expanded", o.children.length]);
                continue
            }
            if (this.fexclude) {
                if (o[l.fexclude[0]] == l.fexclude[1]) {
                    m.push([o[f.valueField || g.valueField || "value"], o[f.textField || g.textField || "text"]]);
                    continue
                }
            }
            if (k(o)) {
                if (l.fprop && k(l.fvalue) && !isInIt(l.fvalue, o[0])) {
                    continue
                }
                if (this.iprop && k(l.ivalue) && isInIt(l.ivalue, o[0])) {
                    continue
                }
                m.push(o)
            } else {

                        continue
                    }
                    if (l.iprop && k(l.ivalue) && isInIt(l.ivalue, o)) {
                        continue
                    }
                    m.push([o, o])
                } else {

                            continue
                        }
                        if (!k(l.fvalue) && o[l.fprop] != l.fvalue) {
                            continue
                        }
                    }
                    if (l.iprop) {
                        if (k(l.ivalue) && isInIt(l.ivalue, BEANUtils.getValue(o, l.iprop))) {
                            continue
                        }
                        if (!k(l.ivalue) && o[l.iprop] == l.ivalue) {
                            continue
                        }
                    }
                    m.push([o[f.valueField || g.valueField || "value"], o[f.textField || g.textField || "text"]])
                }
            }
        }
    }
    ;

          , g = h.localOptions
          , f = h.config;

        }
    }
    ;

    }

                    url: f
                }).then(function(y) {
                    for (var x = 0; x < y.length; x++) {

                        w.id = y[x].defId;
                        t.menuMap[y[x].defId] = w
                    }
                    for (var v = 0; v < y.length; v++) {
                        var m = [];
                        var w = y[v].json;

                        }

            y1: 250,
            x2: l - h + 1,

            height: 64

            strokeWidth: 0.5

        k.append("rect").attr({

            width: 20,
            height: 12
        }).style({
            fill: "#00A8F0",
            stroke: "#999",
            strokeWidth: 0.5
        });

            "class": "olcek-desc-text",
            x: 40,
            y: 22

        k.append("rect").attr({
            x: 12,
            y: 30,
            width: 20,
            height: 12
        }).style({
            fill: "#C0D800",
            stroke: "#999",
            strokeWidth: 0.5
        });
        k.append("text").attr({
            "class": "olcek-desc-text",
            x: 40,
            y: 41
        }).style("fill", "#444").text("Sektördeki Mükelleflerin Genelinin Yer Aldığı Oran Aralığı (E)");
        k.append("rect").attr({
            x: 12,
            y: 50,
            width: 20,
            height: 12
        }).style({
            fill: "#CB4B4B",
            stroke: "#999",
            strokeWidth: 0.5
        });
        if (m) {
            l = "Mükellefin sektöründen sapması yoktur"
        } else {
            l = this.formatNumber(j - l, 6)
        }
        k.append("text").attr({
            "class": "olcek-desc-text",
            x: 40,
            y: 61
        }).style("fill", "#444").text("Mükellefin Sektörden Sapması: " + l)
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.render = function(s) {
        if (!g.d3LibLoaded) {

        }
        var q = this
          , n = q.bf
          , k = q.config;
        var j = k.width;
        if (!j) {

            if (r) {

                  , p = h.height ? h.height + "" : "16px";
                if (i.indexOf("%") < 0 && p.indexOf("%") < 0) {
                    i = i.indexOf("px") >= 0 ? i : i + "px";

        var Z = this
          , X = Z.bf
          , M = Z.config;
        var W = Z.data
          , s = 550;
        var w = [], aa = [], O = {}, V, U;

            };
            O[V] = W.xflags[V].color
        }

        xGroupMax = d3.max(W.xflags, function(i) {
            return i.value
        });
        xGroupMin = d3.min(W.xflags, function(i) {
            return i.value
        });

            top: parseInt(this.config.top, 10),

          , h = M.style.height;
        if (!f) {

            f = C > 400 ? C : 500
        }

            var J = $$.innerHeight(q);
            h = J > 200 ? J : 500
        }

            maxHeight: h + r.top + r.bottom + "px",
            minHeight: h + r.top + r.bottom + "px"

            xGroupMax = W.value

            for (var V = 0; V < Math.round(xGroupMax / 10); V++) {

            }
        }
        if (xGroupMax > 100 && xGroupMax <= 999 && xGroupMin < 100) {
            for (var V = 0; V < Math.round(xGroupMax / 100); V++) {
                E[V] = Math.floor(xGroupMin / 10) * 100 + (V * Math.floor(xGroupMin / 10) * 100 + 50)
            }
        }
        if (xGroupMax > 100 && xGroupMax <= 999 && xGroupMin > 100) {
            for (var V = 0; V < Math.round(xGroupMax / 100); V++) {

            }
        }
        if (xGroupMax > 1000 && xGroupMin >= 1000) {
            for (var V = 0; V < Math.round(xGroupMax / 1000); V++) {

            }
        }
        if (xGroupMax > 1000 && xGroupMin < 100) {
            for (var V = 0; V < Math.round(xGroupMax / 1000); V++) {

        var t = d3.svg.axis().scale(N).tickSize(1).tickPadding(6).orient("left");

        o.append("g").attr("class", "y axis").attr("transform", "translate(0, 0)").call(t);

            var P = Math.round(xGroupMax / 10) * 10

        H.transition().duration(2000).ease("linear").attrTween("transform", B(Q.node()));

(function(window, undefined) {
    function Definition(CS) {
        this.DEFAULTS = {
            disabled: false,
            cls: "csc-fileupload",
            quickSubmit: true
        };
        this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
        this.METHODS = ["setParameters(jp)", "clearParameters", "getFiles(getObj)", "uploadFiles", "abort"];
        this.EVENTS = ["selected", "changed", "upload-started", "upload-completed(respObj)"];
        this.DEPENDENCIES = [{
            name: "JQuery",
            version: "2.0.3"
        }, {
            name: "tus",
            version: "1.4.5"
        }];
        this.Type = function(moduleName) {
            this.uploadComplatedCallback = null;
            this.uploadStartedCallback = null;
            this.dndEmptyText = SideMLManager.get("common.dndEmptyText");
            if (BCDefaults.get("CSC-FILEUPLOAD", "customFileSelector", undefined, moduleName)) {
                window.customFileSelector = true
            }
        }
    }
    var def = new Definition();
    def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
    BCEngine.registerType("CSC-FILEUPLOAD", def);
    var BC = def.Type;
    BC.prototype.init = function() {
        var bc = this;
        if (this.config.tusSupport && !window.tusLibLoaded && !window.tus) {
            SLibraryLoader.loadLib("tus", ["js/3thParty/tus/tus.min.js"], {
                progress: true
            }, function() {
                window.tusLibLoaded = true;
                BFEngine.a();
                BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
                BFEngine.r()
            })
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
        return this.config.value
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
        this.config.value = value
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.setParameters = function(jp) {
        this.params = jp
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.clearParameters = function() {
        delete this.params
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.checkExceptList = function(fileNames) {
        if (!this.config.except) {
            return
        }
        var exceptList = [];
        var except = this.config.except.split(",");
        for (var i = 0; i < except.length; i++) {
            except[i] = stringTrim(except[i]);
            if (except[i]) {
                exceptList.push(except[i])
            }
        }
        for (var i = 0; i < fileNames.length; i++) {
            for (var j = 0; j < exceptList.length; j++) {
                if (SIDEString.endsWith(fileNames[i], SIDEString.ifMimeTypeConvertToExtension(exceptList[j]))) {
                    var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "notAllowedToUpload", fileNames[i], exceptList[j]);
                    CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
                        error: true
                    });
                    throw msg
                }
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.checkAcceptList = function(fileNames) {
        if (!this.config.accept) {
            return
        }
        var acceptList = [];
        var accept = this.config.accept.split(",");
        for (var i = 0; i < accept.length; i++) {
            accept[i] = stringTrim(accept[i]);
            if (accept[i]) {
                acceptList.push(accept[i])
            }
        }
        var acceptIt = false;
        for (var i = 0; i < fileNames.length; i++) {
            acceptIt = false;
            for (var j = 0; j < acceptList.length; j++) {
                if (SIDEString.endsWith(fileNames[i].name, SIDEString.ifMimeTypeConvertToExtension(acceptList[j]))) {
                    acceptIt = true
                }
            }
            if (!acceptIt) {
                var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "notAllowedToUpload2", fileNames[i].name, this.config.accept);
                CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
                    error: true
                });
                throw msg
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.submit = function() {
        this.preSubmit();
        var bc = this;
        var formData = new FormData();
        var $finput = $("#" + this.config.id);
        var files = $finput.get(0).files;
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            formData.append("file", files[i])
        }
        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.upload.addEventListener("progress", function() {
            bc.uploadProgress()
        }, false);
        xhr.addEventListener("load", function(event) {
            bc.uploadComplete(event, this.status)
        }, false);
        xhr.addEventListener("error", function(event) {
            bc.uploadComplete(event, this.status)
        }, false);
        xhr.open("POST", this.getUrl(), true);
        xhr.withCredentials = true;
        xhr.send(formData);
        $finput.replaceWith($finput.clone())
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.uploadFiles = function() {
        if (this.config.tusSupport) {
            this.preSubmit();
            this.tusInstance.start()
        } else {
            this.submit()
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.abort = function() {
        if (this.config.tusSupport) {
            this.tusInstance.abort()
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.getFiles = function(getObj) {
        var result = [];
        var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
        if (!$$dom) {
            return result
        }
        var files = $$dom.files;
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            if (getObj) {
                result.push(files[i])
            } else {
                result.push(files[i].name)
            }
        }
        return result
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.uploadProgress = function() {
        var event = window.event;
        if (!event) {
            return
        }
        var progress = Math.round(event.loaded / event.total * 100);
        $$.html(this.config.id + "-progress-div", progress + "%")
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.uploadComplete = function(event, status) {
        if (!event) {
            event = window.event
        }
        if (status !== 200) {
            if (this.config.msg !== false) {
                var $$infodiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
                if ($$infodiv) {
                    this.message = SideMLManager.get(this, "uploadFailed", status);
                    $$infodiv.style.display = "";
                    $$infodiv.innerHTML = this.message
                }
            }
            this.uploadComplatedCallback(false)
        } else {
            if (this.config.msg !== false) {
                var $$infodiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
                if ($$infodiv) {
                    $$infodiv.style.display = "";
                    this.message = SideMLManager.get("common.uploadCompleted", status);
                    $$infodiv.innerHTML = this.message
                }
            }
            if (this.uploadComplatedCallback) {
                if (!this.config.respType || this.config.respType === "json") {
                    var respObj = null;
                    if (typeof event.target.responseText === "object") {
                        respObj = event.target.responseText
                    } else {
                        if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
                            try {
                                respObj = eval("(" + event.target.responseText + ")")
                            } catch (e) {}
                        }
                    }
                    this.uploadComplatedCallback(respObj)
                } else {
                    this.uploadComplatedCallback(event.target.responseText)
                }
            }
        }
        this.removeMaskDiv();
        if (this.config.dnd) {
            this.renderDnd()
        }
        this.reRender()
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.createMaskDiv = function(isDnd) {
        if (this.config.showProgress === false) {
            return
        }
        var bc = this;
        var $$dynDiv = $$.byid(bc.config.id + (isDnd ? "-dnd-div" : "-div"));
        if ($$dynDiv) {
            if (!$$.byid(bc.config.id + "-mask")) {
                var width = $$.innerWidth($$dynDiv);
                var height = $$.innerHeight($$dynDiv);
                var cssObj = {
                    width: width + 3,
                    height: height + 3,
                    position: "absolute",
                    background: "#d0d0d0",
                    opacity: 0.6,
                    textAlign: "center",
                    zIndex: 1111
                };
                var $$maskDiv = $$.create("div", {
                    id: bc.config.id + "-mask"
                }, ["csc-fileupload-mask"], cssObj);
                $$dynDiv.parentNode.insertBefore($$maskDiv, $$dynDiv);
                var $$loaderImg = $$.create("img", {
                    src: "css/bc-style/img/ajax-loader2.gif"
                }, null, {
                    marginTop: "7px"
                }, $$maskDiv)
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.removeMaskDiv = function() {
        $$.remove(this.config.id + "-mask")
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.dndUploadComplete = function(event) {
        if (!event) {
            event = window.event
        }
        var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
        $$progress.value = 100;
        $$progress.innerHTML = 100;
        this.files = null;
        var respStr = "";
        if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
            respStr = event.target.responseText
        }
        this.clearLog();
        this.writeLog(SideMLManager.get("common.uploadCompleted"));
        if (this.uploadComplatedCallback) {
            if (!this.config.respType || this.config.respType == "json") {
                var respObj = null;
                if (typeof event.target.responseText === "object") {
                    respObj = event.target.responseText
                } else {
                    if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
                        respObj = eval("(" + event.target.responseText + ")")
                    }
                }
                this.uploadComplatedCallback(respObj)
            } else {
                this.uploadComplatedCallback(event.target.responseText)
            }
        }
        this.removeMaskDiv();
        this.renderChooseFile()
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.dndSubmit = function() {
        var bc = this;
        var files = this.files;
        if (files == null) {
            var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen");
            CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
            throw msg
        }
        for (var i = 0; this.config.maxSize && i < files.length; i++) {
            if (files[i].size > this.config.maxSize * 1024) {
                var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileTooBig", this.config.maxSize);
                CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
                    error: true
                });
                return
            }
        }
        var fileNames = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            fileNames.push(files[i].name)
        }
        this.checkExceptList(fileNames);
        this.checkAcceptList(files);
        if (this.uploadStartedCallback) {
            this.uploadStartedCallback()
        }
        var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
        var formData = new FormData();
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            formData.append("file", files[i])
        }
        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.onload = function(event) {
            bc.dndUploadComplete(event)
        }
        ;
        xhr.upload.onprogress = function(event) {
            if (event.lengthComputable) {
                var complete = (event.loaded / event.total * 100 | 0);
                $$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = complete
            }
        }
        ;
        xhr.onerror = function(err) {
            bc.writeLog("Hata oluştu:" + err);
            this.files = null
        }
        ;
        xhr.withCredentials = true;
        xhr.open("POST", this.getUrl(), true);
        xhr.send(formData);
        this.files = null;
        this.createMaskDiv(true)
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.clearLog = function() {
        var dndArea = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
        dndArea.innerHTML = ""
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.writeLog = function(file) {
        var dndArea = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
        if (file && file.name) {
            dndArea.innerHTML += "<li>" + file.name + "    " + (file.size ? (file.size / 1024 | 0) + "K" : "") + "</li>"
        } else {
            dndArea.innerHTML += "<li>" + file + "</li>"
        }
        console.log(file)
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.clear = function() {
        var $$fileSelector = $$.byid(this.config.id);
        if ($$fileSelector) {
            $($$fileSelector).val("")
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.clearInner = function() {
        var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
        if ($$progress) {
            $$progress.innerHTML = ""
        }
        var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
        var $$fileSelector = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
        if ($$progress && $$fileSelector) {
            $$progress.innerHTML = "";
            $$progress.value = 0;
            $$fileSelector.innerHTML = this.dndEmptyText
        }
        this.files = null
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.readfiles = function(files) {
        if (!this.files) {
            this.files = files
        } else {
            for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                this.files.append(file, files[i])
            }
        }
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            this.writeLog(files[i])
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.getUrl = function() {
        var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
        var moduleName = bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf("."));
        if (this.params && this.params.module) {
            moduleName = this.params.module
        }
        var url = SideModuleManager.getAppUrl(moduleName, this.config.servletPath);
        if (url.indexOf("?cmd=") < 0) {
            url += "?cmd=fileUpload"
        }
        var token = CSSession.getToken(this.bf);
        if (token) {
            var tokenKey = window.getSideDefaults("param-token-key", this.bf);
            url += "&" + tokenKey + "=" + encodeURIComponent(token)
        }
        if (typeof this.params == "object") {
            for (var key in this.params) {
                url += "&" + key + "=" + this.params[key]
            }
        }
        return url
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
        if (this.config.tusSupport && !window.tusLibLoaded && !window.tus) {
            return
        }
        var $$minimizeIcon;
        var $contDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
        if ($contDiv) {
            $contDiv.parentNode.removeChild($contDiv);
            $$.css($contDiv, "visibility", "visible");
            $container.appendChild($contDiv);
            return
        } else {
            $contDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-cont-div")
        }
        if (this.bf.isReadonly()) {
            this.config.disabled = true
        }
        if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "popup") {
            var bc = this;
            if (!($container.className === "cs-popup-content")) {
                $$minimizeIcon = $$.create("DIV", {
                    id: this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"
                }, "csc-fileupload-minimize-icon");
                $container.appendChild($$minimizeIcon);
                var bf = bc.bf;
                $$minimizeIcon.onclick = function() {
                    var popup = new CSSimplePopup($contDiv,{
                        disableShotcuts: false,
                        closeOnEscape: true,
                        dontRemove: false,
                        title: "File Upload",
                        width: 400
                    });
                    popup.open();
                    bc.renderChooseFile();
                    if (bc.config.dnd && !$$.isie9()) {
                        bc.renderDnd()
                    }
                    var dom = byid(bc.config.id + "-btn");
                    dom.onclick = function() {
                        bf.fire("selected")
                    }
                }
                ;
                return
            }
        } else {
            if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "inline" && !$$.byid(this.config.id + "-minimize-icon")) {
                var bc = this;
                $$minimizeIcon = $$.create("DIV", {
                    id: this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"
                }, "csc-fileupload-minimize-icon");
                $container.appendChild($$minimizeIcon);
                $$minimizeIcon.onclick = function() {
                    bc.config.clickedMinimizeButton = true;
                    var $$dom = $$.byid(bc.config.id + "-cont-div");
                    if ($$dom.style.display !== "none") {
                        $$.css($$dom, "display", "none")
                    } else {
                        $$.css($$dom, "display", "")
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        $container.appendChild($contDiv[0]);
        if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "inline" && !this.config.clickedMinimizeButton) {
            $$.css($$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div"), "display", "none")
        }
        this.renderChooseFile();
        if (this.config.dnd && !$$.isie9()) {
            this.renderDnd()
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.renderChooseFile = function($container) {
        var $contDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-cont-div");
        var bc = this;
        var disabled = this.config.runOnDisabled !== true && this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
        var $fileUploadDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-div");
        var $progressDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-progress-div");
        if ($fileUploadDiv.length !== 0) {
            $fileUploadDiv.html("").show();
            $progressDiv.html("").show()
        } else {
            $fileUploadDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-div");
            $progressDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
            $contDiv.append($fileUploadDiv);
            $contDiv.append($progressDiv)
        }
        this.message = null;
        var $form, $$iframe;
        if ($$.isie9()) {
            var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
            $form = $("<form>").attr({
                method: "post",
                enctype: "multipart/form-data",
                target: "iif" + this.config.id
            });
            $$iframe = $$.create("iframe", {
                name: "iif" + this.config.id,
                id: "iif" + this.config.id,
                width: 0,
                height: 0,
                border: 0
            }, null, {
                display: "none"
            });
            if (window.customFileSelector) {
                $form.css("display", "table")
            }
        }
        if (window.customFileSelector) {
            var $fileSelector = $('<input style="width:100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px !important;">');
            $fileUploadDiv.css("display", "table");
            var $customFileSelector = $('<div class="csc-fileupload-custom-fileselector csc-fileupload">').append($fileSelector);
            $customFileSelector.addClass(this.config.cls);
            var $fakeSelector = $("<div>").appendTo($customFileSelector);
            var $fakeSelectorInput = $('<input type="button" value="' + SideMLManager.get(this, "chooseFileLabel") + '" >').appendTo($customFileSelector);
            var $fakeSelectorSpan = $("<span>" + SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen") + "</span>").appendTo($customFileSelector)
        } else {
            var $fileSelector = $("<input>")
        }
        $fileSelector.bind("change", function(e) {
            var $fileUploadDiv = $("#" + bc.config.id + "-dnd-div");
            var $progressDiv = $("#" + bc.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
            $fileUploadDiv.hide();
            $progressDiv.hide();
            bc.clearInner();
            if (bc.config.tusSupport) {
                bc.initTus(e.target.files)
            }
            bc.bf.fire("changed")
        });
        $fileSelector.addClass(this.config.cls);
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "id", this.config.id);
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "type", "file");
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "accept", this.config.accept);
        if (this.config.multiple) {
            checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "multiple", "multiple")
        }
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "size", "20");
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "disabled", disabled);
        if (window.customFileSelector) {
            checkAndAddAttribute($fakeSelectorInput, "disabled", disabled)
        }
        checkAndSetCss($fileSelector, this.config.style);
        if (window.customFileSelector) {
            checkAndSetCss($customFileSelector, "display", this.config.visible ? "table-cell" : "none")
        } else {
            checkAndSetCss($fileSelector, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none")
        }
        if ($form) {
            $fileSelector.attr("name", "file");
            if (window.customFileSelector) {
                $form.append($customFileSelector)
            } else {
                $form.append($fileSelector)
            }
            $fileUploadDiv.append($form);
            $fileUploadDiv.append($$iframe);
            $$iframe.firstload = true;
            $$iframe.onload = function() {
                if ($$iframe.firstload) {
                    $$iframe.firstload = false;
                    return
                }
                var content;
                try {
                    content = $$iframe.contentDocument.body.textContent;
                    bc.uploadComplete({
                        target: {
                            responseText: content
                        }
                    }, 200)
                } catch (e) {
                    var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "uploadFailedOldBrowser");
                    alert(msg);
                    bc.uploadComplete({
                        target: {}
                    }, "")
                }
                bc.reRender()
            }
        } else {
            if (window.customFileSelector) {
                $fileUploadDiv.append($customFileSelector)
            } else {
                $fileUploadDiv.append($fileSelector)
            }
        }
        $fileSelector.css(this.config.style || {});
        if (window.customFileSelector) {
            $customFileSelector.css(this.config.style || {})
        }
        if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
            $fileSelector.css("display", "");
            $fileSelector.attr("disabled", "")
        }
        $fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileupload");
        var btnTitle = SideMLManager.get("common.upload");
        if (this.config.title) {
            btnTitle = this.config.title
        }
        if (this.config.button !== false) {
            var $uploadButton = $("<input>");
            $uploadButton.attr({
                id: this.config.id + "-btn",
                type: "submit",
                value: btnTitle
            });
            if (disabled) {
                $uploadButton.attr("disabled", disabled)
            }
            $uploadButton.addClass(this.config.cls);
            checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, this.config.style);
            if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
                var bc = this;
                if ($form) {
                    $form[0].onsubmit = function() {
                        $form.attr("action", bc.getUrl());
                        var file = $fileSelector.val();
                        if (!file) {
                            return false
                        }
                        bc.checkExceptList([file]);
                        if (bc.uploadStartedCallback) {
                            bc.uploadStartedCallback()
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    $uploadButton.click(function() {
                        $("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
                        bc.submit($fileSelector)
                    })
                }
            }
            $uploadButton.addClass("csc-fileupload");
            checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");
            if (!disabled) {
                if ($form) {
                    $form.append($uploadButton)
                } else {
                    $fileUploadDiv.append($uploadButton)
                }
            }
            if (window.customFileSelector) {
                $fileSelector.change(function() {
                    var files = "";
                    if (this.files.length > 1) {
                        files = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileChosen", this.files.length)
                    } else {
                        files = this.files[0].name
                    }
                    $fakeSelectorSpan.text(this.files.length > 0 ? files : SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen"))
                })
            }
        } else {
            if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
                var bc = this;
                $fileSelector.change(function(e) {
                    if (!bc.config.quickSubmit) {
                        return
                    }
                    if ($form) {
                        $form.attr("action", bc.getUrl());
                        var file = $fileSelector.val();
                        if (!file) {
                            return
                        }
                        bc.checkExceptList([file]);
                        if (bc.uploadStartedCallback) {
                            bc.uploadStartedCallback()
                        }
                        $form.submit();
                        return
                    }
                    $("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
                    bc.submit($fileSelector)
                })
            }
        }
        if (!this.config.showProgress) {
            $progressDiv.hide()
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.renderDnd = function() {
        var $contDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-cont-div");
        var bc = this;
        var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
        if (disabled && this.config.runOnDisabled !== true) {
            return
        }
        var $fileUploadDndDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-dnd-div");
        if ($fileUploadDndDiv.length !== 0) {
            $fileUploadDndDiv.html("").show()
        } else {
            $fileUploadDndDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-dnd-div");
            $contDiv.append($fileUploadDndDiv)
        }
        $fileUploadDndDiv.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd");
        $fileUploadDndDiv.addClass(this.config.cls);
        checkAndSetCss($fileUploadDndDiv, this.config.style);
        checkAndSetCss($fileUploadDndDiv, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");
        var $infoDiv = $("<div>").addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-info-div");
        var $progressDiv = $("<progress>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div").attr("min", "0").attr("max", "100").attr("value", "0");
        var $fileSelector = $("<ul>");
        $fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-dnd-area");
        checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "id", this.config.id + "-dnd");
        $fileSelector.html(this.dndEmptyText);
        $infoDiv.append($progressDiv);
        $fileUploadDndDiv.append($fileSelector);
        $fileUploadDndDiv.append($infoDiv);
        if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
            $fileUploadDndDiv.css("display", "");
            $fileUploadDndDiv.attr("disabled", "")
        }
        $fileSelector[0].ondragover = function() {
            $fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
            return false
        }
        ;
        $fileSelector[0].ondragend = function() {
            $fileSelector.removeClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
            return false
        }
        ;
        $fileSelector[0].ondrop = function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            $fileSelector.removeClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
            bc.readfiles(e.dataTransfer.files);
            $("#" + bc.config.id + "-div").hide();
            $("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").hide();
            if (bc.config.button === false) {
                bc.dndSubmit()
            }
        }
        ;
        if (this.config.button !== false) {
            var btnTitle = SideMLManager.get("common.upload");
            if (this.config.title) {
                btnTitle = this.config.title
            }
            var $uploadButton = $("<input>");
            $uploadButton.attr({
                id: this.config.id + "-dnd-btn",
                type: "submit",
                value: btnTitle
            });
            checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, this.config.style);
            if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
                $uploadButton.click(function() {
                    $progressDiv.html("");
                    bc.dndSubmit()
                })
            }
            $infoDiv.append($uploadButton)
        }
        var $clearButton = $("<input>");
        checkAndAddAttribute($clearButton, "type", "button");
        checkAndAddAttribute($clearButton, "value", SideMLManager.get("common.clear"));
        $clearButton.click(function() {
            bc.clearInner()
        });
        $infoDiv.append($clearButton);
        if (!this.config.showProgress) {
            $progressDiv.hide()
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.getHtmlId = function() {
        if (this.config.minimize === "popup") {
            return this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"
        }
        return this.config.id + "-cont-div"
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
        if (eventName === "selected") {
            var dom = byid(this.config.id + "-btn");
            if (typeof dom !== "undefined" && dom !== null) {
                dom.onclick = callback
            }
        } else {
            if (eventName === "upload-completed") {
                this.uploadComplatedCallback = callback
            } else {
                if (eventName === "upload-started") {
                    this.uploadStartedCallback = callback
                }
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.initTus = function(files) {
        if (files.length > 1) {
            SPopup.MessageBox("Tus.io support can not work when Multiple Upload property is enabled!", {
                error: true
            })
        } else {
            var bc = this;
            var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
            this.tusInstance = new tus.Upload(files[0],{
                endpoint: bc.getUrl(),
                retryDelays: [0, 1000, 3000, 5000],
                onProgress: function(bytesUploaded, bytesTotal, x, y) {
                    if (bc.config.showProgress) {
                        $$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = (bytesUploaded / bytesTotal * 100).toFixed(2) + "%"
                    }
                },
                onError: function(err) {
                    bc.uploadComplete(null, err)
                },
                onSuccess: function(x, y, z) {
                    bc.uploadComplete(null, 200)
                },
                onChunkComplete: function(x, y, z) {
                    console.log("asasas")
                }
            })
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.preSubmit = function() {
        var $finput = $("#" + this.config.id);
        var files = $finput.get(0).files;
        if (files.length === 0) {
            var msg = SideMLManager.get("common.noFileToUpload");
            CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
            throw msg
        }
        for (var i = 0; this.config.maxSize && i < files.length; i++) {
            if (files[i].size > this.config.maxSize * 1024) {
                var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileTooBig", this.config.maxSize);
                CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
                    error: true
                });
                return
            }
        }
        var fileNames = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
            fileNames.push(files[i].name)
        }
        this.checkExceptList(fileNames);
        this.checkAcceptList(files);
        if (this.uploadStartedCallback) {
            this.uploadStartedCallback()
        }
        this.createMaskDiv()
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
        var component = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
        if (component) {
            var container = component.parentNode;
            container.removeChild(component);
            $$.css(component, "visibility", "hidden");
            $$.body().appendChild(component)
        }
    }
    ;
    BC.prototype.destroybc = function() {
        var component = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
        if (component) {
            var container = component.parentNode;
            if (container.tagName !== "BODY") {
                container.removeChild(component)
            }
        }
    }
}

(function(window, undefined) {
    function Definition(CS) {
        this.DEFAULTS = {
            disabled: false
        };
        this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
        this.LABEL = "File Upload Drag And Drop";
        this.METHODS = [];
        this.EVENTS = ["selected", "upload-started", "upload-completed(respObj)"];
        this.DEPENDENCIES = [{
            name: "JQuery",
            version: "2.0.3"
        }];
        this.Type = function() {
            this.uploadComplatedCallback = null;
            this.uploadStartedCallback = null;
            this.dndEmptyText = SideMLManager.get("common.dndEmptyText")
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
        this.Type.prototype.getValue = function() {
            return this.config.value
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
            this.config.value = value
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.uploadComplete = function(event) {
            if (!event) {
                event = window.event
            }
            var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
            $$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = 100;
            this.files = null;
            var respStr = "";
            if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
                respStr = event.target.responseText
            }
            this.writeLog(respStr || SideMLManager.get("common.uploadCompleted"));
            if (this.uploadComplatedCallback) {
                var respObj = null;
                if (typeof event.target.responseText === "object") {
                    respObj = event.target.responseText
                } else {
                    if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
                        respObj = eval("(" + event.target.responseText + ")")
                    }
                }
                this.uploadComplatedCallback(respObj)
            }
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.writeLog = function(file) {
            var dndArea = $$.byid(this.config.id);
            if (file && file.name) {
                dndArea.innerHTML += "<li>" + file.name + "    " + (file.size ? (file.size / 1024 | 0) + "K" : "") + "</li>"
            } else {
                dndArea.innerHTML += "<li>" + file + "</li>"
            }
            console.log(file)
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.clear = function(files) {
            var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
            var $$fileSelector = $$.byid(this.config.id);
            if ($$progress) {
                $$progress.innerHTML = "";
                $$progress.value = 0
            }
            if ($$fileSelector) {
                $$fileSelector.innerHTML = this.dndEmptyText
            }
            this.files = null
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.readfiles = function(files) {
            this.files = files;
            for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                this.writeLog(files[i])
            }
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.submit = function() {
            var bc = this;
            var files = this.files;
            if (files == null) {
                var msg = SideMLManager.get("common.noFileToUpload");
                CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
                throw msg
            }
            if (this.uploadStartedCallback) {
                this.uploadStartedCallback()
            }
            var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
            var formData = new FormData();
            for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                formData.append("file", files[i])
            }
            var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
            xhr.onload = function(event) {
                bc.uploadComplete(event)
            }
            ;
            xhr.upload.onprogress = function(event) {
                if (event.lengthComputable) {
                    var complete = (event.loaded / event.total * 100 | 0);
                    $$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = complete
                }
            }
            ;
            xhr.onerror = function(err) {
                bc.writeLog("Hata oluştu:" + err);
                this.files = null
            }
            ;
            var url = this.config.servletPath;
            if (url) {
                url = CSCaller.getAppURL(url)
            } else {
                url = CSCaller.getDispatchURL()
            }
            url += "?cmd=fileUpload";
            var token = CSSession.getToken(this.bf);
            if (token) {
                var tokenKey = window.getSideDefaults("param-token-key", this.bf);
                url += "&" + tokenKey + "=" + token
            }
            xhr.open("POST", url, true);
            xhr.send(formData);
            this.files = null
        }
        ;
        this.Type.prototype.render = function($container) {
            var bc = this;
            var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
            if (disabled) {
                return

    c.prototype.addEmptyRow = function() {

        }
        var n = this.bf.getRow(this.bf.length() - 1);
        if (n && n.isEmpty(true)) {

                readonly: false

                return
            }

            if (o != this.bf.getCurrentPage()) {

            }

    c.prototype.removeSelectedRows = function() {
        if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
            return
        }
        var r = this.bf.getSelectedRows();
        if (!r.length) {

            return
        }
        var o = this.bf.getSelectedRows();
        var n = [];
        for (var p = 0; p < o.length; p++) {
            n.push(o[p].rowid)

            }

        } finally {

        }
    }

                return

                if (y.rows[0][x].mname == r.dragMember) {

                    y.rows[0].splice(x, 1);

            for (var x = 0; x < y.rows[0].length; x++) {
                if (y.rows[0][x].mname == z) {

              , t = o.mname;

                                        rel: K
                                    }, "csc-dt-searchPanel-add", {
                                        top: L.y + "px",
                                        left: L.x + "px"

                                    }

                                    if (M == -1) {

                                        J.onclick = function() {

                                            J.parentNode.removeChild(J)

                                    }

                                    k.addEventListener("click", function(N) {

                                            J.parentNode.removeChild(J)
                                        }
                                    });
                                    return false
                                }
                            })
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    c.prototype.renderFilterInput = function(C, w, p) {
        var E = ""
          , v = this
          , t = v.bf
          , H = v.config;

        }

        var q = $$.create("DIV", {

        }, "csc-dt-filter-div");

            id: this.config.id + "-f-br-" + w
        });
        if (p == "eq" || p == "like") {
            var x = $$.create("INPUT", {
                type: "text",

            }, "csc-dt-filter-input");
            q.appendChild(x);
            x.onkeyup = function(L) {
                if (L.keyCode == 13) {
                    var N = this.getAttribute("rel");
                    var M = this.value ? this.value : g;
                    var K = "";
                    var O = t.members[N];
                    if (O) {
                        var J = O.getConfig();
                        K = J.layoutConfig.fpath
                    }
                    v.makeFilter(N, p, M, K)
                }
            }
            ;
            x.focus()
        } else {
            if (p == "cmb") {

                var o = v.bf.members[w];
                if (o) {
                    var A = o.getConfig();
                    D = A.layoutConfig.fpath
                }
                var B = {};
                var s = "<option>------</option>";
                for (var G = 0; G < this.bf.tmembers.length; G++) {
                    var z = this.bf.tmembers[G];
                    var I = z.get(D || w).getText();
                    if (I) {
                        B[I] = true
                    }
                }
                for (var I in B) {
                    s += "<option value='" + I + "'>" + I + "</option>"
                }
                var y = $$.create("SELECT", {
                    rel: w,
                    id: this.config.id + "-f-input-" + w
                }, "csc-table-filter-select");
                y.innerHTML = s;
                y.value = E;
                C.appendChild(u);
                C.appendChild(y);
                y.onchange = function(L) {
                    var M = this.value ? this.value : g;
                    var K;
                    var N = this.getAttribute("rel");
                    var O = v.bf.members[N];
                    if (O) {
                        var J = O.getConfig();
                        K = J.layoutConfig.fpath
                    }
                    v.makeFilter(N, "eq", M, K)
                }
            } else {
                if (p == "btw") {
                    if (!E) {
                        E = []
                    }
                    var r = $(C);
                    var n = $("<input>").attr({
                        rel: w,
                        rel2: "start",
                        value: SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(E[0] || "", "yyyymmdd", "dd/mm/yyyy"),
                        id: this.config.id + "-f-input-" + w
                    }).addClass("csc-table-filter-date");
                    var F = $("<input>").attr({
                        rel: w,
                        rel2: "end",
                        value: SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(E[1] || "", "yyyymmdd", "dd/mm/yyyy"),
                        id: this.config.id + "-f-input2-" + w
                    }).addClass("csc-table-filter-date");
                    r.append($$.create("BR", {
                        id: this.config.id + "-f-br-" + w
                    }));
                    r.append(n);
                    n.datepicker({
                        showButtonPanel: false,
                        onSelect: function(K) {
                            n.val(K);
                            var L = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(K, "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                            var J = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(F.val(), "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                            v.makeFilter(this.getAttribute("rel"), "btw", [L, J])
                        }
                    });
                    n[0].onchange = function() {
                        var K = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(this.value, "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                        var J = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(F.val(), "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                        v.makeFilter(this.getAttribute("rel"), "btw", [K, J])
                    }
                    ;
                    r.append($$.create("BR", {
                        id: this.config.id + "-f-br2-" + w
                    }));
                    r.append(F);
                    F.datepicker({
                        showButtonPanel: false,
                        onSelect: function(K) {
                            F.val(K);
                            var J = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(K, "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                            var L = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(n[0].value, "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                            v.makeFilter(this.getAttribute("rel"), "btw", [L, J])
                        }
                    });
                    F[0].onchange = function() {
                        var J = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(this.value, "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                        var K = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(n.val(), "dd/mm/yyyy", "yyyymmdd");
                        v.makeFilter(this.getAttribute("rel"), "btw", [K, J])
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.unrenderFilterInput = function(o, r, n) {
        var q = this;
        o.style.width = "";
        var p = $$.byid(q.config.id + "-filter-div");
        $$.remove(p);
        q.filters[r].rendered = null;
        q.makeFilter(r, n, g)
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.makeFilter = function(s, n, q, o) {
        var r = this;
        if (s) {
            r.filters[s].ftype = n;
            r.filters[s].fvalue = q;
            r.filters[s].fpath = o
        }
        var p = [];
        for (var s in r.filters) {
            if (!r.filters[s].rendered) {
                continue
            }
            p.push({
                name: s,
                type: r.filters[s].ftype,
                value: r.filters[s].fvalue,
                path: r.filters[s].fpath
            })
        }
        r.bf.filter(p)
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.getPageRowCount = function() {

    c.prototype.excelExport = function() {
        var s, p, u = this, t = u.bf;
        var w = u.config.exportInvisibleColumns;
        var n = u.config.gridFileType
          , x = false;
        if (i) {
            CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox("You cannot export excel for the duration of this timeout: " + (getSideDefaults("excelExport-button-timeout") / 1000) % 60 + "sec.", {
                error: true
            });
            return
        }
        i = true;
        setTimeout(function() {
            i = false
        }, getSideDefaults("excelExport-button-timeout"));
        t.fire("onbeforeexcelexport");
        if (t.$CS$.ds) {
            p = "EXPORT_EXCEL_FROM_DS";
            s = csCloneObject(t.$CS$.ds, true);
            x = true;
            if (s.params && s.params.pv) {
                s.params.pv.limit = 100000
            }
        } else {
            p = "EXPORT_EXCEL";
            t.$CS$.fromExcelExport = true;
            t.$CS$.exportInvisibleColumns = w;
            t.$CS$.excelFileFormat = n;
            s = t.getText();
            delete t.$CS$.fromExcelExport;
            delete t.$CS$.exportInvisibleColumns;
            delete t.$CS$.excelFileFormat
        }
        if (getSideDefaults("support-service-call-extra-params", t.getModuleName()) && k.callParams && s) {
            if (!s.params) {
                s.params = {}
            }
            for (var r in k.callParams) {
                s.params[r] = k.callParams[r]
            }
        }
        var q = t.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
        var o = this.excelModule || t.getModuleName();
        var v = t.$CS$.name
          , y = t.getParent();
        do {
            if (y && y.isBusinessField()) {
                v = y.$CS$.name + "." + v
            }
            if (y) {
                y = y.getParent()
            }
        } while (y && y.$CS$.CTX !== "root");
        if (y) {
            v = y.$CS$.name + "." + v
        }
        SIDEUtil.downloadFileWithPost({
            cmd: p,
            s: "ş",
            jp: {
                metadata: t.getMetaData(g, {
                    exportInvisibleColumns: w
                }, x),
                ds: s,
                filename: u.efl,
                excelFileFormat: n,
                checkSpecialChars: u.config.checkSpecialChars || false,
                config: this.excelConfig || g,
                sideLang: k.sideLang,
                cp: v,
                page: v.split(".")[0]
            }
        }, {
            url: SideModuleManager.getAppUrl(o, this.config.excelExportPath || "side-support-gridexport"),
            module: o,
            onload: function(z) {
                CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(z, {
                    error: true
                })
            },
            onerror: function(z) {
                if (getSideDefaults("show-excel-export-errors")) {
                    CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(z, {
                        error: true
                    })
                }
            }
        })
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.setExcelExportPath = function(n) {
        this.config.excelExportPath = n
    }
    ;
    c.prototype.renderFooter = function() {
        var v = this, r = this.bf, O = v.config, F;
        if (!v.$$rbody || !v.$$footer) {
            return
        }
        var M = this.bf.fmembers || this.bf.tmembers;
        var u = this.pnumber
          , P = M.length;
        if (this.bf.$CS$.ds) {
            u = this.bf.$CS$.ds.page;
            P = this.bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount
        }
        var x = this.$$footer;
        x.innerHTML = "";
        var H = $$.create("TABLE", null, null, null, x);
        var C = $$.create("TR", null, null, null, H);
        var J = $$.create("TD", {
            rel: "l"
        }, null, null, C);
        var w = $$.create("TD", {
            rel: "c"
        }, null, null, C);
        var q = $$.create("TD", {
            rel: "r"
        }, null, null, C);
        if (O.useColModelMeta && O.utilButtonsBottom) {
            var K = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-dt-actions-div", null, J);
            var z = $$.create("SPAN", {
                id: O.id + "-modify"
            }, ["csc-dt-action-btn", "csc-dt-action-modify"], null, K);
            z.onclick = function() {
                v.renderMetaWindow(this);
                var Q = $$.byid(v.config.id + "-metaContainer");
                $$.css(Q, "bottom", $$.height(v.$$hscroll) + $$.height(v.$$footer) + "px");
                $$.css(Q, "top", "");
                $$.css(Q, "right", "inherit")
            }
        }
        if (this.config.page && this.config.showAllBtn) {
            var N = $$.create("INPUT", {
                type: "button",
                value: v.showAll ? SideMLManager.get("common.showPaging") : SideMLManager.get("common.showAll")
            }, "csc-dt-showallbtn");
            J.appendChild(N);
            N.onclick = function() {
                v.showAll = !v.showAll;
                var Q = v.config.pageNum;
                if (v.showAll) {
                    v.oldPageNum = Q;
                    Q = 100000
                } else {
                    Q = v.oldPageNum
                }
                v.config.pageNum = Q;
                v.pnumber = 1;
                v.bf.gotoPage(1)
            }
        }
        if (this.config.gridExport) {
            var G = $$.create("INPUT", {
                type: "button",
                value: SideMLManager.get("common.exportExcel")
            }, "csc-dt-exportbtn");
            J.appendChild(G);
            G.onclick = function() {
                v.excelExport()
            }
        }
        if (this.config.gridImport) {
            var t = $$.create("INPUT", {
                type: "button",
                value: SideMLManager.get("common.importExcel")
            }, "csc-dt-importbtn");
            J.appendChild(t);
            t.onclick = function() {
                var V = $$.create("DIV", {
                    id: "excel_import_popup"
                });
                var ab = $$.create("TABLE", {}, g, {
                    width: "300px"
                }, V);
                var aa = $$.create("TR", {}, g, g, ab);
                var Y = $$.create("TD", {}, g, g, aa);
                var X = $$.create("TD", {}, g, g, aa);
                var Z = $$.create("TR", {}, g, g, ab);
                var Q = $$.create("TD", {
                    colspan: "2"
                }, g, g, Z);
                if (v.config.gridImportCheckbox) {
                    Y.innerHTML = SideMLManager.get("common.clearTable");
                    var U = $$.create("INPUT", {
                        type: "checkbox",
                        id: "excel_import_clear_checkbox"
                    }, g, g, X)
                }
                var T = $$.create("INPUT", {
                    type: "button",
                    id: "excel_import_doneButton",
                    value: SideMLManager.get("common.done")
                }, "csc-button", g, Q);
                var W = $$.create("SPAN", g, "csc-rospan", g, V);
                W.innerHTML = SideMLManager.get("common.importExcelWarning");
                var S = $$.create("TEXTAREA", {
                    id: "excel_import_contentTextarea"
                }, ["excel-import-textarea"], {
                    width: "100%",
                    height: "405px"
                }, V);
                T.onclick = function() {
                    var ak = $$.byid("excel_import_clear_checkbox");
                    var ah = false;
                    if (ak) {
                        ah = ak.checked
                    }
                    R.close();
                    v.bf.fire("onbeforeexcelimport");
                    var al = S.value.split("\n");
                    if (al[al.length - 1] == "") {
                        al.pop()
                    }
                    var aj = [];
                    var ac = [];
                    var au;
                    for (var ag in v.bf.members) {
                        var ai = v.bf.members[ag];
                        if (ai.bcRef.typeName !== "CSC-HIDDEN" && ai.isVisible()) {
                            aj.push(ag);
                            ac.push(ai.bcRef.typeName)
                        }
                        if (ai.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-CURRENCY" && ai.isVisible() && !au) {
                            var af = v.bf.members[ag].getConfig().id;
                            if (af) {
                                var at = $$.byid(af);
                                for (var aq = 0; at && aq < at.attributes.length; aq++) {
                                    if (at.attributes[aq].nodeName.indexOf("data") != -1) {
                                        if (!au) {
                                            au = {}
                                        }
                                        au[at.attributes[aq].nodeName] = at.attributes[aq].nodeValue
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    var av = [];
                    for (var aq = 0; aq < al.length; aq++) {
                        var ad = {};
                        var am = al[aq].split("\t");
                        if (v.onexcelimport) {
                            am = v.onexcelimport(am, al[aq]);
                            if (!am) {
                                continue
                            }
                        }
                        for (var ap = 0; ap < aj.length; ap++) {
                            if (am[ap]) {
                                if (ac[ap] == "CSC-CURRENCY") {
                                    $$body = document.getElementsByTagName("BODY")[0];
                                    var ax = $$.create("SPAN", au, g, g, $$body);
                                    var aw = $(ax);
                                    aw.autoNumeric("init", {
                                        aForm: false
                                    });
                                    aw.html(am[ap]);
                                    var an = aw.autoNumeric("get");
                                    aw.remove();
                                    ad[aj[ap]] = an
                                } else {
                                    if (ac[ap] == "CSC-DYN-COMBOBOX" || ac[ap] == "CSC-COMBOBOX") {
                                        var ar = v.bf.members[aj[ap]];
                                        var ae = ar.getOptions();
                                        for (var ao = 0; ao < ae.length; ao++) {
                                            if (am[ap] == ae[ao].text) {
                                                ad[aj[ap]] = ae[ao].value;
                                                break
                                            }
                                        }
                                    } else {
                                        ad[aj[ap]] = am[ap]
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        av.push(ad)
                    }
                    if (ah) {
                        v.bf.clear()
                    }
                    v.bf.add(av, {
                        readonly: v.config.readonly
                    });
                    v.bf.fire("onExcelImport-complated");
                    v.reRender()
                }
                ;
                var R = new CSSimplePopup(V,{
                    dontRemove: false,
                    title: SideMLManager.get("common.importExcel"),
                    width: 750,
                    height: 550,
                    closeOnEscape: true
                });
                R.open()
            }
        }
        if (O.page && !v.showAll) {
            var o = $$.create("div", {
                id: this.config.id + "-div"
            }, "csc-dt-paging-div");
            w.appendChild(o);
            var L = Math.ceil(P / this.config.pageNum);
            var p = $$.create("span");
            if (this.bf.$CS$.ds) {
                p.innerHTML = " /" + (Math.ceil(P / this.config.pageNum) || 1) + " "
            } else {
                p.innerHTML = " /" + (Math.ceil(this.bf.tmembers.length / this.config.pageNum) || 1) + " "
            }
            var v = this;
            var B = $$.create("span", g, "csc-dt-paging-btn csc-dt-seek-first");
            var y = $$.create("span", g, "csc-dt-paging-btn csc-dt-seek-prev");
            if (u == 1) {
                $$.addClass(B, "csc-dt-paging-btn-disabled");
                $$.addClass(y, "csc-dt-paging-btn-disabled")
            } else {

    d.prototype.destroybc = function(f) {

    ;
    d.prototype.addNode = function(h) {

          , j = h.parentid
          , f = h.label;

        }
        h.children = [];
        g[k] = h;
        var i = g[j];
        if (i) {
            i.children.push(k)
        } else {

                i = g[j] = {
                    id: -1,
                    children: []
                };
                i.children.push(k)
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    d.prototype.searchByKey = function(g) {
        var j = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-tree");
        if (!j) {
            return
        }
        var k = j.getElementsByTagName("li");
        if (!g) {
            throw "Please fill key parameter."
        }
        if (/[i|İ|ı|I]/.test(g)) {
            g = g.replace(/[i|İ|ı|I]/g, "[ı,I,i|İ]")
        }
        for (var f = 0; f < k.length; f++) {
            var h = $$.child(k[f], "A");
            if (k[f].textContent.trim().search(new RegExp("(" + g + ")","ig")) === -1) {
                $$.addClass(k[f], "csc-cstree-search-hide")
            } else {
                if (h.textContent.search(new RegExp("(" + g + ")","ig")) !== -1) {
                    h.innerHTML = h.innerHTML.replace(new RegExp("(" + g + ")","i"), '<span class="csc-cstree-search-highlight">$1</span>')
                }
            }
        }

            throw "No results were found in tree after searching."
        }
    }
    ;
    d.prototype.clearSearch = function() {

            }

                var l = j[f].parentNode.innerHTML;
                var m = l.indexOf("<span");
                var k = l.indexOf("</span");
                j[f].parentNode.innerHTML = l.substring(0, m) + j[f].innerHTML + l.substring(k + 7)

        }

          , h = j[n];

                    l.children.splice(f, 1)
                }
            }
        }
    }
    ;

        var n = this.treeMap;

            console.error(f);

        }
        var g = n[j.parentid];
        var o = n[h.parentid];
        var i = csdu.arrayContains(g.children, j.id);

            g.children.splice(i, 1)
        }

            j.parentid = h.parentid;

            }

        }
    }

    d.prototype.saveTreeState = function(h) {

        }

    }

                        if (l) {

                            try {
                                h.add({}, {
                                    readonly: false,
                                    position: k
                                });
                                var p = h.getRow(k);
                                for (var m in p.members) {
                                    if (!p.members[m].isReadonly()) {
                                        p.members[m].focus();
                                        break
                                    }
                                }
                            } finally {
                                BFEngine.r()
                            }
                            j.cadd = false;
                            h.fire("onaddrow", p.rowid);
                            if (j.cadd) {

                                return
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    e.prototype.render = function(t) {

        }
        if (this.config.style && this.config.style.overflow) {

        }

        }
        this.$$table.setAttribute("rel", this.bf.$CS$.name);
        o.addRowOnEnter(o.$$table);
        if (this.rowsMetaData.length > 0 && this.simpleElement) {

            t.appendChild(s);

        }
        t.appendChild(this.$$tableDiv);
        var k = this.config.titleType || "none";
        if (k == "window") {
            var A = $$.create("div", null, ["csc-form-title", this.config.titleClass], {
                width: "100%"
            });
            var j = $$.create("span", null, this.config.titleIcon);
            j.innerHTML = this.config.title;
            A.appendChild(j);
            if (this.config.collapsible === true) {
                var y = $$.create("ins", null, "collapse");
                y.onclick = function() {
                    if (o.collapsed) {
                        m.expand()
                    } else {
                        m.collapse()
                    }
                }
                ;
                A.appendChild(y)
            }
            this.$$tableDiv.appendChild(A);
            this.$$tableDiv.appendChild(this.$$table)

                var u = $$.create("legend");

        }

                this.renderDefaultHeader();
                this.calculateCellWidths();
                this.applyCellWidths()
            }
        } else {
            if (!this.header && !this.config.noHeader) {
                this.renderDefaultHeader();
                this.calculateCellWidths();
                this.applyCellWidths()
            }
        }
        if (this.rowCounter) {
            this.rowCounter = 0
        }

            this.bf.tmembers = [];

                    if (this.pageIndex > w) {

                    }
                    this.renderRows((this.pageIndex - 1) * this.config.pageNum, (this.pageIndex) * this.config.pageNum)
                } else {

                }
            }

    ;
    e.prototype.collapse = function() {
        var k = $$.byid(this.config.id);
        var h = $$.child(k, "fieldset");
        if (!h) {
            var i = $$.query(k, [{
                tagName: "div",
                clazz: "csc-form-title"
            }, {
                tagName: "ins"
            }]);
            if (i) {
                $$.rmClass(i, "collapse");
                $$.addClass(i, "expand")
            }
        } else {
            var j = $$.query(k, [{
                tagName: "fieldset"
            }, {
                tagName: "legend"
            }]);
            if (j) {
                $$.rmClass(j, "collapse");
                $$.addClass(j, "expand")
            }
        }
        var l = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-t");
        l.style.display = "none";
        this.collapsed = true
    }
    ;
    e.prototype.expand = function() {
        var k = $$.byid(this.config.id);

                tagName: "div",
                clazz: "csc-form-title"
            }, {
                tagName: "ins"

                $$.rmClass(i, "expand");
                $$.addClass(i, "collapse")
            }
        } else {
            var j = $$.query(k, [{
                tagName: "fieldset"
            }, {
                tagName: "legend"
            }]);
            if (j) {
                $$.rmClass(j, "expand");
                $$.addClass(j, "collapse")
            }
        }
        var l = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-t");
        l.style.display = "";

    }

                }, {

                }, {

                m = $$.byid(j.id + "-sall")
            }
            if (m) {

        }

    ;
    e.prototype.sortArray = function(i) {
        var h = this;
        return i.sort(function(k, j) {
            if (typeof j.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getValue() == "string") {
                return k.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getValue().localeCompare(j.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getValue())
            } else {
                if (k.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getValue() < j.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getvalue()) {
                    return -1
                }
                if (k.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getValue() > j.members[h.config.fieldNameForGroup].getvalue()) {
                    return 1
                }
                return 0
            }
        })
    }
    ;
    e.prototype.reCalculateTotalRow = function() {
