    ;
    e.prototype.formatTotal = function(l) {
        if (!this.totalRow || !this.totalRow.getConfig().totalFormat) {
            return SIDEMath.formatDecimal(l.toString(), 2)
        }
        if (this.totalRow.getConfig().totalFormat == "curr1") {
            l = SIDEMath.formatDecimal(l.toString(), 2);
            var m = l.substring(0, l.length - 3);
            var n = ""
              , h = l.substring(l.indexOf(".") + 1);
            var k = m.length % 3;
            if (k == 0) {
                k = 3
            }
            for (var j = k; j <= m.length; j += 3) {
                n += m.substring(j - 3, j);
                if (j != m.length) {
                    n += ","
                }
            }
            return n + "." + h
        }
        if (this.totalRow.getConfig().totalFormat == "curr2") {
            l = Math.round(l);
            l = SIDEMath.formatDecimal(l, 0);
            var n = "";
            var k = l.length % 3;
            if (k == 0) {
                k = 3
            }
            for (var j = k; j <= l.length; j += 3) {
                n += l.substring(j - 3, j);
                if (j != l.length) {
                    n += ","
                }
            }
            return n
        }
    }
    ;
    e.prototype.addTotalRow = function(x) {
        if (!this.$$tbody) {
            return
        }
        this.$$tbody = $$.byid(this.$$tbody.id);
        if (!this.$$tbody) {
            return
        }
        if (this.totalRow && ((SIDEUtil.isEmpty(this.totalRow.members) && this.totalRow.isVisible()) || (!SIDEUtil.isEmpty(this.totalRow.members) && this.totalRow.hasVisibleItem() && this.totalRow.isVisible()))) {
            var s = this.totalRow.getConfig().id;
            var m = $$.byid(s + "-tr");
            if (m) {
                if (!x) {
                    var v = m.nextElementSibling;
                    $$.remove(m);
                    m = $$.create("tr", {
                        id: s + "-tr"
                    }, ["csc-table-total-row", this.totalRow.getConfig().cssClass]);
                    if (v && v.tagName == "TR") {
                        this.$$tbody.insertBefore(m, v)
                    } else {
                        this.$$tbody.appendChild(m)
                    }
                } else {
                    m.innerHTML = ""
                }
            } else {
                m = $$.create("tr", {
                    id: s + "-tr"
                }, ["csc-table-total-row", this.totalRow.getConfig().cssClass]);
                this.$$tbody.appendChild(m)
            }
            var o = this.totalRow.getConfig().label;
            if (o === f) {
                o = "Toplam: "
            }
            var z = false;
            for (var k in this.totalRow.members) {
                z = true;
                break
            }
            if (!z) {
                var j = new BigDecimal("0")
                  , r = this.totalRow.getConfig().sumProp;
                if (!this.totalRow.getConfig().sumFromDS && r) {
                    for (var y = 0; y < this.bf.length(); y++) {
                        var u = this.bf.getValue(y, r) || "0";
                        if (typeof u != "string") {
                            u = u + ""
                        }
                        u = u.replace(/,/g, "");
                        u = new BigDecimal(u);
                        j = j.add(u)
                    }
                } else {
                    if (this.totalRow.getConfig().sumFromDS) {
                        if (this.bf.$CS$ && this.bf.$CS$.ds && this.bf.$CS$.ds.sum) {
                            j = new BigDecimal(this.bf.$CS$.ds.sum.toString())
                        }
                    }
                }
                var t = $$.create("td", {
                    id: s,
                    colspan: this.colCellCount
                });
                var q = $$.create("span", f, "csc-rospan");
                q.innerHTML = o + this.formatTotal(j);
                t.appendChild(q);
                m.appendChild(t)
            } else {
                var p = 0;
                if (this.config.selectable) {
                    p++;
                    m.appendChild($$.create("td"))
                }
                if (this.config.rownumbers) {
                    p++;
                    m.appendChild($$.create("td"))
                }
                for (var k in this.totalRow.members) {
                    var h = this.totalRow.members[k];
                    var l = h.getConfig();
                    if (!l.visible) {
                        continue
                    }
                    var n = (l.layoutConfig && l.layoutConfig.colSpan) ? l.layoutConfig.colSpan : f;
                    var w = (l.layoutConfig && l.layoutConfig.cellAlign) ? l.layoutConfig.cellAlign : f;
                    var t = $$.create("td", {
                        colspan: n
                    }, f, {
                        textAlign: w
                    });
                    m.appendChild(t);
                    if (h.bcRef && h.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE-TOTAL-CELL") {
                        var j = new BigDecimal("0")
                          , r = h.getConfig().sumProp;
                        if (!h.getConfig().sumFromDS && r) {
                            for (var y = 0; y < this.bf.length(); y++) {
                                if (l.sumOnlySelecteds && !this.bf.getRow(y).isSelected()) {
                                    continue
                                }
                                var u = this.bf.getValue(y, r) || "0";
                                if (typeof u != "string") {
                                    u = u + ""
                                }
                                u = u.replace(/,/g, "");
                                u = new BigDecimal(u);
                                j = j.add(u)
                            }
                            h.setValue(j)
                        } else {
                            if (h.getConfig().sumFromDS && h.getConfig().sumPropInDS) {
                                if (this.bf.$CS$ && this.bf.$CS$.ds && this.bf.$CS$.ds[h.getConfig().sumPropInDS]) {
                                    j = new BigDecimal(this.bf.$CS$.ds[h.getConfig().sumPropInDS].toString())
                                }
                                h.setValue(j)
                            }
                        }
                        BFEngine.render(h, t)
                    } else {
                        BFEngine.render(h, t)
                    }
                    if (n) {
                        p += n
                    } else {
                        p++
                    }
                }
                if (p < this.colCellCount) {
                    var t = $$.create("td", {
                        colspan: this.colCellCount - p
                    });
                    m.appendChild(t)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    e.prototype.renderRows = function(D, y) {

          , V = X.bf
          , K = X.config;

                var w = U[R];
                if (this.config.rowApp == "zebra") {
                    var I = R % 2 == 0 ? "csc-table-even" : "csc-table-odd"
                }
                var L = [];
                for (var T = 0; T < this.rowsMetaData.length; T++) {
                    var l = this.rowsMetaData[T];
                    if (!l.identifier) {

            s += "<td style='min-width:10px'></td>";
            k += 10
        }

        n.innerHTML = s;

          , A = 0
          , j = [];

                continue
            }
            if (l.rownumbers) {
                l.absoluteWidth = 24;
                u += l.absoluteWidth;
                continue
            }
            if (typeof l.width == "string" && l.width.indexOf("px") > 0) {
                l.absoluteWidth = parseInt(l.width, 10);
                u += l.absoluteWidth
            } else {
                l.relativeWidth = parseInt(l.width, 10);

            }

        if (j.length == 0 || t <= (u + q)) {

            j[y].relativeWidth = o[y]

    }

        }
        if (h) {
            var i = {};
            i.parent = h.parentNode;
            while (i.parent) {
                if (i.parent.scrollTop > 0) {

                }
                i.parent = i.parent.parentNode
            }

    }
    ;
    e.prototype.loadScrollPosition = function() {
